title: oh-my-space sources.yaml
description: Declarative list of external source repositories for the oms CLI. Each entry becomes a bare clone + worktree under sources/<alias>/.

alias.description: Unique identifier; becomes the directory name under sources/.

url.description: Clonable git URL (ssh, https, or file://).

branch.description: Baseline branch to check out as the default worktree. Omit to use the remote's default branch.
